desc: First Standard for Trial Use (STU) release of the IHE RAD MADO profile.
descmd: First Standard for Trial Use (STU) release of the IHE RAD MADO profile.
title: Manifest-based Access to DICOM Objects (MADO)
introduction: Enables access to DICOM objects through a manifest-based approach, allowing clients to retrieve and manage medical imaging data efficiently.
registry-description: Enables access to DICOM objects through a manifest-based approach, allowing clients to retrieve and manage medical imaging data efficiently.
